Full_Description:
We are seeking a driven and highly coordinated Data Center Design Manager / specialist to lead the end-to-end design lifecycle of our mission-critical facilities. In this role, you will bridge the gap between technical engineering, architectural design, and project execution. You will act as the primary design authority, managing external consultants and coordinating cross-functional internal teams to ensure our data centers are designed for maximum reliability, efficiency, and scalability.

The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in Electrical, Mechanical, or Architectural design, coupled with practical experience in critical infrastructure environments.

Key Responsibilities

Design Management & Coordination

End-to-End Design Leadership: Manage the complete design lifecycle for new data center builds and retrofits, from conceptual design and schematic design (SD) through design development (DD) and Issued for Construction (IFC) documents.

Multidisciplinary Integration: Lead the integration of Architectural, Civil, Structural, Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) systems, ensuring zero spatial conflicts and 100% design cohesion.

Standardization: Ensure all facility designs align with global corporate standards, uptime requirements, and operational capacity roadmaps.

Stakeholder & Consultant Management

Consultant Oversight: Direct external Architects of Record (AOR), MEP engineers, and specialty consultants. Manage scopes of work, deliverables, and performance against project schedules.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner closely with internal stakeholders, including Construction, Operations, IT/Network Infrastructure, and Sustainability teams, to translate business requirements into technical design solutions.

Design Reviews: Chair recurring design coordination meetings and lead comprehensive milestone design reviews with executive leadership and technical teams.

Technical Review & Quality Assurance

Due Diligence: Assist in technical site due diligence, feasibility studies, and test-fit layouts for prospective greenfield and brownfield data center projects.

Quality Control: Perform rigorous QA/QC on all design packages, ensuring compliance with local building codes, jurisdictional standards, and industry best practices (e.g., ASHRAE, Uptime Institute).

Value Engineering: Identify opportunities for cost optimization and schedule acceleration through Value Engineering (VE) workshops, without compromising mission-critical performance or safety.

Construction Support

Field Coordination: Provide continuous design oversight during the pre-construction and construction phases.

RFI & Submittal Management: Rapidly evaluate and resolve engineering challenges, respond to Requests for Information (RFIs), and review technical submittals for long-lead equipment.

Basic Qualifications

Education: Bachelor’s degree in electrical engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Architecture, or a closely related technical discipline.

Experience: 3 to 5 years of professional experience in engineering design, design management, or project management.

Industry Background: Demonstrated experience working on critical infrastructure projects (e.g., Data Centers, Hospitals, Power Plants, Semiconductor Fabs, or Laboratories).

Technical Fluency: Strong working knowledge of critical MEP systems (e.g., HVAC cooling systems, chillers, UPS, switchgear, generators, and power distribution).

Software Skills: Proficiency with design and coordination software such as AutoCAD, Revit, Navisworks (BIM clash detection), and Bluebeam.

Preferred Qualifications

Certifications: Professional Engineer (PE) license, Registered Architect (RA), or Project Management Professional (PMP) certification.

Hyperscale/Colocation Experience: Direct experience designing or managing the design of hyperscale or commercial colocation data centers.

Sustainability Focus: Familiarity with sustainable design practices, energy efficiency standards (LEED, ENERGY STAR), and advanced cooling technologies.

Soft Skills: Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to translate complex engineering tradeoffs to non-technical business leaders.

Job summary :
The Retail Operations Analyst (AI Specialist) is responsible for bridging the gap between retail data and front-line execution. You will leverage Generative AI and Prompt Engineering to transform sales dashboards into automated, actionable coaching scripts and operational directives. Your goal is to ensure that every store receives high-quality, data-driven guidance that sounds human, empathetic, and strategically sound.

Job Description :
Prompt Engineering & AI Implementation:

Develop and maintain a library of Structured Prompts that convert retail KPIs into daily "Action Plans" for store staff.

Refine the AI’s "Voice" to ensure it aligns with the company's leadership tone—assertive yet highly motivational.

Perform constant A/B Testing on AI outputs to improve the accuracy and effectiveness of the coaching scripts.

Data Analysis & Structuring:

Monitor daily/weekly retail metrics (Sales Target vs. Actual, %Run Rate, ATV, UPT, and Stock Turnover).

Clean and structure raw data into formats compatible with AI models (LLMs) to ensure "Zero-hallucination" results.

Identify sales trends and "underperformance triggers" that require immediate AI-generated intervention.

Operational Integration:

Coordinate with the Area Managers to ensure the AI Store Manager’s directives are being adopted and executed on the floor.

Gather feedback from front-line employees to humanize and improve the AI’s communication style.

Workflow Automation:

Assist in building and maintaining simple automation workflows  to push AI insights directly to communication platforms (eg.LINE)

Qualifications :
Experience: 2–4 years of experience in Retail Operations, Sales Analysis, or Business Development.

AI Savvy: Proven ability to use LLMs (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) beyond basic chatting. You must understand System Prompts, Constraints, and Logic-based prompting.

Analytical Skills: Strong ability to read dashboards (Tableau, PowerBI, or Excel) and translate "Cold Data" into "Warm Insights."

Retail Fluency: Deep understanding of retail jargon and floor dynamics (e.g., knowing why a staff member might struggle with Upselling or Trade-ins).

Technical Tools: Advanced Excel/Google Sheets. Familiarity with SQL or Low-code automation tools is a significant plus.

Mindset: Highly empathetic toward front-line workers, systematic in thinking, and comfortable with rapid experimentation.

We are seeking a high-caliber Business Analyst to join SCBX Group. This role focuses on gathering, analyzing, and translating business requirements into clear documentation and actionable insights, supporting the design and delivery of AI-driven products and solutions across the group.




Key responsibilities :

Gather and analyze business requirements from stakeholders, translating them into structured documentation for product and technology teams.

Collaborate closely with business and technology squads to ensure solutions align with defined objectives and user needs.

Prepare clear and comprehensive process flows, functional specifications, and supporting documentation throughout the project lifecycle.

Support user acceptance testing by defining test scenarios and validating that delivered solutions meet business requirements.

Monitor and track project progress, flagging risks or gaps to relevant stakeholders in a timely manner.

Contribute to continuous improvement of business analysis practices across the team.




If you meet below qualifications and are ready to take on a challenging role, we encourage you to apply.

Experience in business analysis or a related field.

Strong ability to gather, document, and communicate requirements across both business and technology stakeholders.

Proficiency in process mapping, functional specification writing, and requirements management.

Analytical mindset with structured problem-solving and attention to detail.

Experience working in agile or squad-based delivery environments.

Exposure to financial services, fintech, or AI-driven product development is an advantage.




About Us

SCBX is the mothership of the financial technology business group comprising Siam Commercial Bank, SCB 10X Co., Ltd., Card X Co., Ltd., InnovestX Securities Co., Ltd., and other companies. SCBX drives and powers the development and execution of strategic initiatives, with a particular emphasis on financial enterprises and digital technologies. This includes pursuing new business opportunities, M&A, strategic investments, partnerships, and divestitures. It captures some of the biggest growth opportunities with superior returns, by adapting to consumers' changing behaviors and demands in a timely manner. These industries will improve the overall quality of life while serving a greater purpose. The company conducts business with flexibility and prudence in governance and risk management and has the potential to compete equally in global competitions.

Job Responsibilities

1. Provide 24-hour response to operational failures of the bank's core banking system, covering business anomalies in application systems (e.g., deposit, loan, report, and document systems) and infrastructure anomalies (e.g., cloud services, databases, and networks);

2. Conduct real-time monitoring of system issues and respond promptly; escalate issues to the subsequent handling process in a timely manner, and assist in extracting logs and data required for issue analysis;

3. Upon receiving the bank's MA support request, initiate the response process within 15 minutes, and quickly complete preliminary localization through troubleshooting of abnormal phenomena, log analysis, and data verification;

4. Cooperate efficiently with the bank to resolve Serv1 or Serv2-level system issues;

5. Prepare detailed incident reports, and accurately communicate the results of root cause analysis to the bank and support teams;

6. Organize the MA processes of the core system, iteratively update the MA support manual, and ensure the implementation of standardized MA practices.




Job Requirements

1. A bachelor's degree or above, majoring in computer science, software engineering, or related fields.

2. Have in-depth familiarity with the application architecture of the bank's core systems, master relevant knowledge of cloud environment operation and maintenance, and possess professional knowledge of IT Service Management (ITSM) best practices.

3. Have excellent written and verbal communication skills, and be able to convey complex information clearly and concisely. Thai or English communication skills are required (candidates who can speak Chinese will be given priority).

4. Recognize and accept the 24-hour, 7-day shift system, and be able to adapt to night shifts and holiday duty (each shift includes 30-minute shift-handover time).

5. Have strong coordination and organizational abilities, and be able to manage multiple tasks efficiently and prioritize them clearly.

6. Be familiar with the Spring Boot framework and have Java coding and development capabilities.

7. Be familiar with the access operations of mainstream databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL), and have the ability to optimize SQL, tune performance, and optimize batch tasks.

8. Be proficient in mainstream development tools such as Eclipse and IntelliJ IDEA, be skilled in using version management tools such as Git and SVN, and log management and analysis tools such as Kibana.

9. Be able to work stably in Thailand for a long time, have good self-learning ability, and be able to quickly adapt to business and technological updates.

Job Expectation

จัดการ และกำหนดมาตรการด้านความปลอดภัย (security protocols) ของ cloud environments

ประสานงาน และร่วมมือกับ Technology teams ต่างๆ เพื่อให้แน่ใจว่าการแก้ปัญหาคลาวด์ตรงตามความต้องการขององค์กร

สร้าง Cloud Architecture ที่เป็นมาตรฐานในระดับองค์กร และรองรับกลยุทธ์ IT Modernization

จัดทำเอกสารเกี่ยวกับการออกแบบสถาปัตยกรรม การกำหนดค่า และแนวทางปฏิบัติที่ดีที่สุด

ช่วยควบคุมต้นทุน cloud ระดับองค์กรด้วยการออกแบบที่ cost-efficient

Functional Competency (Skill & Knowledge and Qualification)
Core Technical Skills

เชี่ยวชาญด้านการออกแบบ Cloud Architecture (AWS / Azure / GCP / Huawei อย่างน้อยหนึ่งรายในระดับ Architect)

ออกแบบโครงสร้างพื้นฐานระดับองค์กร เช่น:

Cloud Landing Zone, Multi-Account/Multi-Subscription Structure

Secure Network Architecture (VPC/Firewall/Transit/Zero Trust)

IAM Architecture และ Key Management

High Availability, DR และ Data Protection

มีประสบการณ์ด้าน Application Modernization (microservices, API-first, container orchestration)

เข้าใจ data architecture เบื้องต้นเพื่อสนับสนุน Data Modernization

ความเชี่ยวชาญ Cloud Governance: Policy, Standards, Tagging, Resource Model, Workload Classification

Security Architecture (IAM, encryption, vulnerability management, logging, monitoring)

มีประสบการณ์ในการจัดตั้งหรือดำเนินการ Cloud Center of Excellence (CCoE) จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

Compliance Framework เช่น ISO 27001, NIST, PDPA

Qualification

ปริญญาตรี/โท สาขา Computer Engineering, Computer Science, IT หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์ด้าน Cloud Architecture 5 ปีขึ้นไป

มี Cloud Solution Architect Certificate จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

Key Responsibility

1. Cloud Architecture Design

ออกแบบ Enterprise Cloud Architecture ครอบคลุม Network, Security, Compute, Storage, Integration

จัดทำ Architecture Blueprint, Reference Architecture และ reusable patterns

2. Cloud Governance & Compliance

จัดทำ Cloud Governance Framework ให้ครอบคลุม IAM, Tagging, CICD, FinOps, Compliance

ประสานงานกับ Cloud Operations เพื่อให้ architecture ถูกนำไป implement อย่างถูกต้อง

3. Cloud Center of Excellence (CCoE) Setup & Leadership

เป็นผู้ขับเคลื่อน CCoE

นิยาม scope, operating model, process และ governance ของ CCoE

สร้าง cloud capability ให้ทีมภายใน เช่น training, playbook

ช่วยวิเคราะห์และออกแบบทางเลือก modernization (Rehost/Replatform/Refactor/Replace)

ทำงานกับทีม Application/Data เพื่อวางสถาปัตยกรรมระบบเป้าหมาย

สนับสนุนการสร้าง Landing Zone และ migration foundation

Our client, a fast-growing martech / loyalty solutions platform, is looking for a Frontend Developer to lead the development of high-performance web applications. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building scalable, user-centric products while guiding junior developers and shaping frontend best practices.




Key Responsibilities

Translate product requirements into technical designs, sequence diagrams, and API specifications

Experience with TypeScript, Git, and testing (unit & integration)

Role Overview

We are seeking an Security Solution Architect Lead to join our Technology & Information Architectures team. In this role, you will be responsible for defining, reviewing, and integrating application security architecture across complex digital platforms and workstreams.

You will act as a security subject matter expert, providing architectural leadership, advisory support, and decision‑making across multiple teams. This role requires strong technical depth in application security, the ability to influence stakeholders, and experience embedding security into all phases of the application lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities

Define, review, and integrate application security requirements across applications and platforms.

Review and provide input into application security technical architecture, ensuring security considerations are embedded into final design decisions.

Act as a security architecture lead, owning security decisions across multiple teams and workstreams.

Collaborate with cross‑functional teams (architecture, development, infrastructure, and delivery) to ensure security is integrated throughout the SDLC.

Conduct application security risk assessments, identify vulnerabilities, and recommend appropriate mitigation strategies.

Provide solutions to cross‑team security challenges, addressing both technical and business risks.

Develop and maintain application security standards, policies, and procedures.

Stay up to date with emerging security threats, technologies, and best practices to continuously improve application security posture.

Provide guidance, mentoring, and training to team members on application security principles and best practices.

Act as a trusted advisor to stakeholders, providing security recommendations and influencing key architectural decisions.

Required Skills & Experience

Strong experience in Application Security Architecture or Application Security Lead roles.

Expert proficiency in Application Security, including secure design, threat modeling, and vulnerability management.

Experience performing application security assessments and translating findings into actionable remediation plans.

Strong understanding of enterprise application architectures and system integration.

Proven ability to work across multiple teams and influence architectural and security decisions.

Strong analytical, problem‑solving, and communication skills.

Nice to Have

Experience in enterprise or financial services environments.

Exposure to digital transformation or large‑scale platform initiatives.

Knowledge of secure integration patterns, APIs, and modern application platforms.

Background in consulting or project‑based delivery environments.

Key Responsibilities

Design, build, and maintain scalable CI/CD platforms, pipelines, and workflows to accelerate software delivery.

Define and enforce DevOps best practices and standards, collaborating closely with Development and Operations teams.

Partner with development teams to ensure applications are built with scalability, resilience, security, and performance in mind.

Contribute to system architecture and software development activities, ensuring DevOps principles are embedded throughout.

Lead and support incident triage, root cause analysis, and troubleshooting of production issues.

Develop automation using coding languages and scripting to streamline operations and workflows.

Implement and champion DevSecOps practices across the software development lifecycle.

Proactively identify opportunities for improvement, propose new solutions, and leverage emerging technologies.

Drive knowledge sharing with development and operations teams on DevOps tools, platforms, and practices.



Essential Skills & Prerequisites

5+ years of proven experience in DevOps, Site Reliability Engineering, or related fields.

Solid understanding and hands-on experience in all phases of the software development lifecycle.

Expertise in CI/CD tools such as Jenkins, Helm, Ansible, Terraform, Git, Nexus, etc.

Strong knowledge in modern DevOps/SRE tools: ArgoCD, HashiCorp Vault, Cert Manager, Keycloak, Service Mesh, Event-Driven/Streaming platforms, etc.

Deep experience with Linux operating systems and automation scripting.

Proficiency in multiple programming and scripting languages (e.g., Java, ReactJS, AngularJS, NodeJS, Python, Bash, Golang).

Experience with observability and monitoring platforms such as OpenSearch, Logstash, ELK Stack, Prometheus, Loki, Mimir, Grafana, OpenTelemetry, Jaeger, etc.

Expertise in containerization, Kubernetes, cloud, and virtualization platforms (Docker, CRI-O, AWS, GCP, EKS, OpenShift, VMware, etc.).

Proven track record with high availability, large-scale, and performance-critical systems.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with effective collaboration and communication abilities.

Continuous learner with a passion for emerging technologies and innovation.

Positive, proactive mindset with empathy and a strong team-first attitude.

ตำแหน่ง: SAP Business One (SAP B1) Consultant

บริษัท Softpower IT Co., Ltd. มองหา SAP B1 Consultant ที่มีความเชี่ยวชาญในการส่งมอบโซลูชัน SAP B1 ที่มีคุณภาพสูงสุดให้กับลูกค้า คุณจะได้ร่วมวางแผน ออกแบบ และนำระบบ SAP B1 ไปปรับใช้ในธุรกิจของลูกค้า ซึ่งเป็นบทบาทที่มีความสำคัญต่อการเติบโตของธุรกิจและเป็นโอกาสที่ยอดเยี่ยมในการพัฒนาทักษะซึ่งจะเป็นการเปิดทางไปสู่ความก้าวหน้าในอาชีพของคุณ




หน้าที่หลัก:

ทำความเข้าใจความต้องการของลูกค้า วิเคราะห์และออกแบบโซลูชันที่เหมาะสมด้วยระบบ SAP B1

ระบุปัญหาและข้อจำกัดในระบบ และเสนอแนะแนวทางแก้ไขที่เหมาะสม

ปรับใช้ระบบ SAP B1 ให้เหมาะสมกับธุรกิจของลูกค้า รวมถึงการกำหนดค่าตั้งระบบ การนำเข้าข้อมูล และการทดสอบระบบ

ฝึกอบรมและให้คำปรึกษาแก่ผู้ใช้งาน เพื่อให้มั่นใจว่าสามารถใช้ระบบได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

ให้คำปรึกษาแก่ลูกค้าในกรณีเกิดปัญหาระหว่างการใช้งานระบบ
 

ทักษะ คุณสมบัติ และประสบการณ์:

มีประสบการณ์การเป็น Consultant หรือมีประสบการณ์ในการใช้ระบบ SAP B1 จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

มีความเข้าใจอย่างลึกซึ้งเกี่ยวกับระบบ SAP B1 ในด้านฟังก์ชันการทำงาน 

มีทักษะในการแก้ปัญหา และเป็นผู้ที่สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและนำเสนอแนวทางการแก้ไขได้อย่างมีประสิทธิภาพ

มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถนำเสนอและอธิบายเกี่ยวกับระบบ SAP B1 ให้ผู้ใช้งานเข้าใจได้ง่าย

มีความกระตือรือร้นในการพัฒนาความรู้ด้านระบบ ERP โดยเฉพาะ SAP Business One

สามารถเข้าใจความต้องการของลูกค้าและฟังก์ชันของระบบได้อย่างรวดเร็ว

สามารถวิเคราะห์ปัญหาและแก้ไขสถานการณ์เฉพาะหน้าได้ดี

มีทักษะการคิดวิเคราะห์ การแก้ไขปัญหา และการนำเสนอแนวทางแก้ไขอย่างเป็นระบบ

มีทักษะการสื่อสารที่ดี สามารถอธิบายเรื่องทางเทคนิคให้ผู้ใช้งานเข้าใจได้ง่าย

มีความสามารถในการเรียนรู้และปรับตัวได้ดี เพื่อรับมือกับการเปลี่ยนแปลงและความต้องการของลูกค้า

หากมีความรู้เรื่อง MS SQL การเขียน Query และ Crystal Report จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

สามารถเรียนรู้ระบบหรือกระบวนการใหม่ ๆ ได้อย่างรวดเร็วและมีประสิทธิภาพ

มีทักษะในการใช้งานโปรแกรม Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) ได้ดี

มีใบรับรองการฝึกอบรมหรือประกาศนียบัตรจาก SAP B1 จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ 

สามารถเดินทางไปทำงานกับโครงการลูกค้าที่ต่างจังหวัดได้เป็นระยะ

หากมีพาหนะส่วนตัวจะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

At Krungsri Nimble, we are the innovation-driven tech arm of Krungsri Group, and we’re seeking an experienced, proactive QA Lead to own quality assurance for our banking applications. The role requires strong cross‑functional coordination, the ability to define and execute end‑to‑end testing strategies across integrated systems, and leadership to build and mentor a high‑performing QA team. This person will champion a quality‑first mindset, establish quality gates from design through delivery, and ensure the team delivers reliable, high‑quality products end‑to‑end.

• 5+ years in QA, including 2+ years in a lead role.

• Proven ability to plan and execute E2E tests across complex systems. 
• Effective cross team coordination with multiple stakeholders. 
• Experience partnering with automation teams and contributing to automation strategy. 
• Background in scaling automation within CI/CD pipelines. 
• Solid grasp of QA processes, test management, and defect tracking. 

Why You’ll Love Working With Us 

At Krungsri Nimble, you’ll join a passionate team working at the intersection of technology and banking innovation. We embrace an agile mindset where you’ll have real ownership and the opportunity to influence system design and business outcomes. In our collaborative and transparent environment, we prioritize continuous learning to stay ahead of the curve. If you're looking for a role where you can make a responsible impact, grow your expertise, and help shape the future of digital banking, this is where you belong.

Job Title: CloudNurse Product Manager / Designer

Level: Mid-Level | Full Product Lifecycle Ownership

Location: Bangkok, Thailand (Hybrid – 1 day WFH)




About CloudNurse 

At CloudNurse, we are building the future of nursing operations. Our platform is a comprehensive Nursing Information System that combines EHR (Electronic Health Records) and ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning) to help nursing facilities run their businesses better. We build tools that empower everyone — from nurse aides on the floor to nurse managers and business owners — ensuring better care and smoother operations. 

The Role 

We are looking for a Mid-Level Product Manager / Designer to join our small, lean, and fast-moving team. This is a combined role where you will own the full product lifecycle — from discovery and user research through design and specification to launch, measurement, and continuous improvement. 

You won’t just be making things look good or writing specs in isolation. You will have high ownership over the “why,” “what,” and “how” we build. You will talk directly to users, design solutions using AI-powered tools, write detailed PRDs, hand off to development, define success metrics, track usage post-launch, and drive adoption through documentation, training, and education. 

For your first 3–6 months, your primary goals will be to drive the design and specification of brand-new product features, establish a scalable Design System, and set up measurement frameworks to track feature adoption and impact. 




What You’ll Do 

Discovery & User Research 

• Conduct user interviews and usability testing with nursing staff, nurse managers, and business owners to uncover pain points and validate solutions. 

• Synthesize research findings into actionable insights that inform product direction and feature prioritization. 

• Develop and maintain user personas that represent the distinct needs of nurse aides, nurse managers, and facility owners. 

Design & Prototyping (AI-Assisted) 

• Create UI/UX designs for new features, leveraging AI design tools such as Figma AI, Google Stitch, and similar platforms to accelerate the design process. 

• Build, document, and maintain the official CloudNurse Design System to ensure consistency and speed up development. 

• Translate complex healthcare and business workflows into intuitive interfaces, balancing quick data entry (EHR) with complex business management (ERP). 

Product Specification & Development Handoff 

• Write detailed Product Requirements Documents (PRDs) that include user stories, acceptance criteria, edge cases, and technical considerations. 

• Define scope, requirements, and priorities for new features and improvements.

• Hand off complete specs and designs to the development team with clear documentation, ensuring smooth implementation. 

Measurement & Analytics 

• Define success metrics and KPIs for every feature launched — what to measure, how to measure it, and what targets to hit. 

• Set up and monitor product analytics (e.g., PostHog) to track feature adoption, usage patterns, and user behavior post-launch. 

• Build dashboards and reports that give the team visibility into how features are performing. 

Adoption, Training & Continuous Improvement 

• Analyze usage data to identify drop-off points, underused features, and opportunities for improvement. 

• Plan and execute adoption strategies based on data — including writing or improving help documentation, user guides, and in-app guidance. 

• Coordinate on-site training sessions and educational materials for nursing staff and facility managers to drive feature adoption. 

• Iterate on designs and workflows based on real usage data and user feedback, closing the build–measure–learn loop. 




What We’re Looking For 

• Experience: ~3+ years in Product Design, Product Management, or a combined role — ideally with SaaS, B2B, or complex dashboard products. 

• Design Fundamentals & Systems: Strong understanding of UI/UX fundamentals (typography, spacing, hierarchy). Solid experience with component-based design and building scalable Design Systems. 

• Product & Strategy Mindset: You understand that good design solves business problems. Comfortable conducting user research, defining requirements, writing PRDs, and shaping product strategy. 

• Tool Stack: Highly proficient in Figma. Comfortable using AI-powered design tools (Figma AI, Google Stitch, or similar) to accelerate design and research workflows. 

• Analytics & Measurement: Familiarity with product analytics platforms (e.g., PostHog) to define metrics, track usage, and make data-driven decisions. 

• Communication & Education: Strong ability to articulate design decisions, write clear documentation, and create training materials. Comfortable presenting to stakeholders and leading user training sessions. 

• Bonus: Experience in healthcare, nursing, or regulated industries. 

Location, Language & Work Arrangement 

• Location: Must be based in Bangkok, Thailand. This is a hybrid position with 1 day work-from-home per week. 

• Thai Language: Native-level fluency in spoken and written Thai is required. • English Language: Professional proficiency in spoken and written English is required.

Why Join Us? 

Real Ownership

Own the full product lifecycle — from user research and design through PRDs, analytics, and adoption. Shape the product roadmap and build the design system from scratch.

Impact 

Build software that directly improves the lives of healthcare workers and the efficiency of nursing businesses.

Flexibility 

Hybrid work setup in Bangkok (1 WFH day per week).

About Job

The Online Management Manager is responsible for ensuring the stability, performance, and scalability of the back-end infrastructure supporting our mobile applications. This role bridges the gap between Development, Operations, and Business teams. You will lead the monitoring strategy, manage technical support escalations, and implement DevOps practices to ensure a seamless 24/7 user experience.

System Reliability & Monitoring:

Define and implement a comprehensive Observability and Monitoring strategy (Infrastructure, API latency, and App health).

Monitor system performance using tools to identify bottlenecks and ensure high availability (99.9% Uptime).

Back-end & Mobile App Support:

Lead the L2/L3 Technical Support team to troubleshoot complex back-end and mobile application issues.

Analyze logs and perform Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for system incidents, collaborating with Developers to deploy permanent fixes.

DevOps & Automation:

Oversee and optimize CI/CD pipelines to ensure fast, reliable, and frequent application releases to the App Store and Google Play.

Drive automation for routine operational tasks, such as automated health checks, environment provisioning, and scaling.

Incident & Release Management:

Act as the Incident Commander during major outages, coordinating communication and technical recovery efforts.

Manage the release lifecycle, ensuring back-end compatibility with new mobile app versions.

Technical Qualifications :

Back-end Expertise: Deep understanding of Microservices architecture, RESTful/GraphQL APIs, and Database management (SQL and NoSQL).

DevOps Toolchain: Proficiency in:

Containerization: Docker and Kubernetes (K8s).

CI/CD Tools: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, or CircleCI.

Cloud Platforms: AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

Monitoring & Observability: Hands-on experience with tools like New Relic, Datadog, Grafana, Prometheus, or ELK Stack.

Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Knowledge of Terraform or Ansible is a significant plus.

Requirements :

Experience: 5+ years of experience in IT Operations, Software Engineering, or QA, with at least 2 years in a leadership or management role.

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

Mindset: Strong DevOps mindset—prioritizing automation, collaboration, and continuous improvement.

Communication: Excellent English and Thai communication skills, with the ability to translate technical issues into business impact for stakeholders.

Problem-Solving: Proven ability to work under pressure and manage critical incidents in a fast-paced environment

Responsibilities

The specific responsibilities of the role of Manager in Machine Learning include:

Leverage cutting-edge Natural Language Processing (NLP), Anomaly Detection, Machine Learning (ML), and Artificial Intelligence (AI) technologies to optimize and streamline business processes and decision-making.

Build, test and release services incorporating Anomaly Detection, NLP ML and AI models

We are looking for an AI Product Owner to define, build, and scale AI-powered products that deliver measurable business value. In this role, you will bridge business strategy, product development, and AI capabilities to create innovative solutions using Machine Learning, Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and data-driven technologies.

Collaborate with AI engineers, data scientists, designers, and business stakeholders.

• Model capabilities
• Performance metrics
• Safety & compliance constraints

Manage product backlog, sprint planning, and delivery milestones.

3. Data & AI Performance Management

Define evaluation metrics for AI performance (accuracy, latency, reliability, cost efficiency).

Track and improve AI product success metrics.

Ensure data pipelines and data quality standards support AI features.

Monitor and optimize performance of deployed AI systems.

4. Stakeholder Communication

Present AI product vision and roadmap to business leaders and executives.

Translate complex AI concepts into clear business value.

Prepare executive‑level presentations, dashboards, and reports.

Required

Bachelor’s degree in IT, Software Engineering, Computer Science, or related field.

Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts, including LLMs and Generative AI.

Background in data analytics or technology fields.

Strong analytical, mathematical, and problem‑solving skills.

Excellent communication skills for cross‑functional collaboration.

Ability to explain complex technical topics in a clear, concise way.

Leadership and team collaboration skills.

Preferred

Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies.

Experience with AI/ML product development or MLOps environments.

Ability to manage multiple stakeholders and prioritize effectively.

Job_Title: Lead Cyber Security (Key & Vault Management Specialist)
Company: Bank of Ayudhya Public Company Limited
Full_Description:
Scope Overview

Implement, and operate enterprise-grade cryptographic key management and secrets management solutions within a banking environment. The role will be responsible for ensuring secure key lifecycle management, HSM operations, vault administration, and compliance with regulatory and security standards.

Hands-on experience with Thales Luna HSM is highly preferred.




What you'll do

Cryptographic Key Management

Manage end-to-end cryptographic key lifecycle (generation, distribution, rotation, backup, archival, destruction).

Administer and operate Hardware Security Modules (HSMs), preferably Thales Luna HSM.

Define and enforce key management policies and procedures aligned with banking regulations and industry standards (e.g., PCI DSS, ISO 27001).

Support encryption key integration across banking applications, core systems, payment systems, and digital channels.

Conduct key ceremonies and maintain audit logs.

Vault & Secrets Management

Administer enterprise vault platforms (e.g., HashiCorp Vault or similar).

Manage secrets lifecycle (API keys, certificates, tokens, database credentials).

Configure access control policies, role-based access, and segregation of duties.

Integrate vault solutions with applications, DevOps pipelines, and cloud/on-prem infrastructure.

Monitor vault security posture and perform regular health checks.

Security & Compliance

Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements (BOT, PCI DSS, SWIFT CSP, etc.).

Perform risk assessments related to cryptographic controls.

Support audit activities and provide evidence for internal/external auditors.

Participate in incident response related to key compromise or vault breaches.

Architecture & Improvement

Contribute to cryptographic architecture design and secure key management framework.

Support post-quantum cryptography transition planning (if applicable).

Recommend best practices and continuous improvements for key and secrets management.




Apply now if you have these advantages

Bachelor’s degree or higher in computer science/ data science or any related field.

Minimum of 3-7 years of experience in Information Security or Cryptography (Banking Financial industries are advantage)

·       3–7+ years of experience in Information Security or Cryptography.

·       Hands-on experience with HSM (Thales Luna preferred).

·       Experience in Vault or Secrets Management platforms (e.g., HashiCorp Vault).

·       Experience in banking or financial services environment is highly preferred.

Strong understanding of cryptographic principles (PKI, symmetric/asymmetric encryption, TLS, key wrapping, key derivation).

Experience with key lifecycle management processes.

Knowledge of PKI, certificate management, and CA integration.

Familiarity with PCI DSS encryption requirements.

Scripting skills (e.g., Bash, Python, PowerShell) are a plus

As a part of MUFG (Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group), we a truly a global bank with networks all over the world.

We offer a striking work-life balance culture with hybrid work policies (3 days in office per week).

Role Summary

We are hiring an AI Business Analyst who specialises in building systems and workflows. Your core mission is to make our lean team operate like a much larger one — by designing repeatable AI-powered processes, connecting tools, and ensuring AI adoption spreads across the entire organisation.

This is not a traditional analyst role. You will be our first dedicated AI adoption hire, working directly with senior management to define and build the company's internal AI infrastructure.




Key Responsibilities

AI Workflow Design & Automation

•    Build and maintain a company-wide prompt library covering customer service, product listings, research, and reporting

•    Design and document repeatable AI workflows for high-frequency tasks (weekly reports, listing creation, review analysis)

•    Use no-code tools such as Make or Zapier to automate manual handoffs between team members

•    Audit current team workflows and identify the highest-impact areas for AI automation




Vibe Coding & Lightweight Tool Building

•    Use AI-assisted coding tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude) to build small internal tools, dashboards, and scripts — no formal engineering background required

•    Rapidly prototype solutions using vibe coding: describe what you need, let AI generate the code, iterate until it works

•    Build simple web apps, Google Sheets automations, or internal bots that solve real team problems

•    Maintain and improve these tools over time based on team feedback

•    Collaborate with senior management to scope and prioritise what gets built next




Internal AI Training & Adoption

•    Run monthly hands-on AI skills sessions for team members — practical, not theoretical

•    Maintain an internal AI tool tracker: evaluate new tools monthly and recommend adoption

•    Create onboarding materials so new hires can immediately use AI tools in their role

•    Document all workflows, prompts, and tool decisions for team-wide access




Operations & Performance Support

•    Help maintain and evolve the company performance scorecard — flag anomalies and generate weekly summaries

•    Build dashboards or templates giving the team real-time visibility on key metrics

•    Improve operational efficiency through AI-assisted templates and standard operating procedures




Qualifications

Required

•    Demonstrated experience building workflows or automations using AI tools

•    Comfortable with no-code platforms such as Notion, Airtable, Make, or Zapier

•    Able to write effective prompts for Claude or ChatGPT from scratch for a wide range of tasks

•    Comfortable using AI coding assistants to build simple tools — curiosity and willingness to learn matter more than formal coding experience

•    Systems-oriented mindset: documents everything and builds for team repeatability

•    Self-starter who can scope and deliver from a vague problem statement

•    Clear communication in both Thai and English

•    Bachelor's degree in any field




Preferred

•    Has built internal tools or bots using vibe coding (Cursor, Replit, Claude Artifacts, or similar)

•    Basic Python or Google Apps Script

•    Familiarity with e-commerce seller dashboards (Shopee, TikTok Shop)

•    Data visualisation experience (Google Looker Studio, Tableau)

What We Offer

•    First dedicated AI adoption hire — you define the role and own the impact

•    Work directly with senior management on strategy and tooling

•    Budget for AI tools and subscriptions

•    Fast-track growth path: AI Ops Analyst → AI Ops Lead → Head of Digital Operations

•    Salary: 25,000 – 40,000 THB/month based on experience

•    Location: Bangkok, near BTS Ekkamai

•    Work type: On-site Monday–Friday, with occasional WFH available

Selection Process

Shortlisted candidates will receive a 48-hour take-home assignment:

•    We give you a real recurring task our team currently does manually

•    Design an AI-assisted workflow that makes it at least 3x faster, using any tools you choose

•    Deliver: a working prompt or process, a simple workflow diagram, and a short walkthrough video

What you will do

Implement and support cybersecurity solutions for enterprise customers.

Work with security technologies such as WAF, Endpoint Security (NGAV/XDR), PAM, SASE, ZTNA, CASB, and Vulnerability Assessment tools.

Design and implement end-to-end security solutions across network, endpoint, and cloud environments.

Support customers during and after implementation to ensure smooth operations.

Investigate security issues and help drive remediation.

Prepare basic technical documents such as design documents and implementation guides.

Keep up with new cybersecurity trends and technologies.




What we are looking for

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Computer Engineering or related fields.

4-6 years experience in Cybersecurity or IT Security.

Experience in some of these areas (not required all):

Network Security / Firewall

Endpoint Security

Cloud Security

Vulnerability Assessment

Access Management

Basic understanding of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure or others).

Security certification (CCNA, Security+ or vendor certs) is a plus.

Good problem-solving skills and service mindset.

Able to work independently and as a team.

Responsibilities:

1.Provide advisory and technical support on information security controls and solutions to fulfill requirements of the organization's information security policies and related regulations.

2.Develop and enforce security policies and guidelines.

3.Identify and assess risks in IT infrastructure and business operations, and provide recommendations for risk treatment. Design and implement security controls to mitigate the identified risks.

5.Conduct or coordinate vulnerability assessment, penetration tests and security audits.

6.Manage the log monitoring system. Develop monitoring rules to capture interesting events and analyze suspicious events. Investigate security incidents under the supervision of team leader.

Qualifications:

· Have a solid knowledge of information security (system, network and application security)

Job Title: IT Governance

Job Summary:

Responsible for ensuring IT regulatory compliance, governance, and risk management across the organization. This includes coordinating with internal and external stakeholders on audits and regulatory matters, maintaining IT policies and documentation, identifying and mitigating IT risks, managing incident resolution, and promoting a security-first culture aligned with evolving regulations in the payments industry.

Key Responsibilities:

Regulatory Compliance & IT Governance:

Coordinate with compliance teams, regulators, and external IT audits to address IT-related regulatory matters.

Ensure IT systems and operations comply with relevant regulatory requirements (e.g., PCI-DSS, PDPA, ISO 27001, local financial authority regulations).

Maintain thorough documentation of IT policies, compliance measures, and audit findings.

Ensure proper record-keeping to support audits and regulatory reviews.

IT Risk Management:

Identify, assess, and mitigate IT risks related to security, infrastructure, and operations.

Conduct regular IT risk assessments and audits to uncover vulnerabilities.

Implement risk mitigation strategies and ensure corrective actions are taken.

Prepare reports on IT risks, compliance status, and mitigation plans.

Incident & Issue Resolution:

Investigate and resolve IT security incidents, compliance breaches, and operational failures.

Develop response plans and corrective measures for IT-related risks and issues.

Continuous Improvement:

Keep up to date with changing regulations and compliance requirements in the payments industry.

Work closely with internal IT, compliance, legal, and business teams to ensure regulatory alignment.

Promote a security-first mindset across the company.

Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in information technology, Computer Science, or a related field.

Certifications such as CISA, CISM, CRISC, or CISSP are a strong advantage.

3-7 years of experience in IT risk management or IT governance.

Experience working with banks, financial institutions, or payment service providers.

Hands-on experience in managing IT, security assessments, and risk mitigation.

Strong knowledge of IT security frameworks, risk management methodologies, and compliance standards (PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, NIST, PDPA, etc.).

Familiarity with IT infrastructure, cloud security, and data protection best practices.

Experience with security tools for vulnerability management, monitoring, and compliance tracking.

Excellent communication and negotiation skills for working with regulators and stakeholders.

Strong analytical skills to assess IT risks and implement mitigation strategies.
